description_en: Brasília may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 16 halal restaurants and 2 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Brasília, Brazil, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Brasília: 18 halal restaurants listed, 2 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
